ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player (e.g., D, LW, RW) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with these stats */,
  "left_plays" INTEGER /* Number of left plays */,
  "center_plays" INTEGER /* Number of center plays */,
  "right_plays" INTEGER /* Number of right plays */,
  "oz_plays" INTEGER /* Number of offensive zone plays */,
  "nz_plays" INTEGER /* Number of neutral zone plays */,
  "dz_plays" INTEGER /* Number of defensive zone plays */,
  "ol_plays" INTEGER /* Number of offensive left plays */,
  "oc_plays" INTEGER /* Number of offensive center plays */,
  "or_plays" INTEGER /* Number of offensive right plays */,
  "stretch_passes" INTEGER /* Number of stretch passes made */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots blocked */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team for the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, OT Loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with these stats */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with these stats */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance stats */,
  "ice_time" TEXT /* Time spent on the ice */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., game summary, season summary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_players" (
  "game_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-player relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injury_history" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injured player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the player returned to play */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injury_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
